# Logink

> Logink is a 360° digital marketing agency based in Jakarta, Indonesia. We help Indonesian brands grow online through integrated services: SEO & Content Marketing, Social Media Management, Paid Advertising, Creative Services, and Website & Landing Page development. Our approach combines strategy, creativity, and data into one measurable system.

## Company

- Website: https://logink.co
- Email: hello@logink.co
- Location: Jakarta, Indonesia
- Tagline: Connected Creativity

## Services

- [SEO & Content Marketing](https://logink.co/layanan/jasa-seo-profesional): Organic search growth for Indonesian brands. Keyword research, SEO articles in Bahasa Indonesia, technical optimization, and transparent monthly reporting. Starting from Rp 6 Million/month.
- [Social Media Management](https://logink.co/layanan/sosial-media-manajemen): Social media strategy, content creation, and community management. Covers Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and LinkedIn. 100% original content.
- [Paid Advertising](https://logink.co/layanan/paid-ads): Data-driven ads on Google, Meta, TikTok, and Indonesian marketplaces. Average ROAS 2–4x. Transparent reporting and full account access. Starting from Rp 6 Million/month.
- [Creative Services](https://logink.co/layanan/kreatif): Graphic design, video production, and copywriting. Brand identity, social media content, and ad creatives. 100% original, no templates.
- [Website & Landing Page](https://logink.co/layanan/website-development): High-performance websites and landing pages. CRO-focused design, mobile-first, sub-2-second load time. Starting from Rp 10 Million.

## Key Pages

- [Home (ID)](https://logink.co): Indonesian homepage
- [Home (EN)](https://logink.co/en): English homepage
- [About](https://logink.co/about): Company background, values, and team
- [Portfolio](https://logink.co/portfolio): Case studies and client results
- [Blog](https://logink.co/blog): Digital marketing tips, guides, and insights
- [Contact](https://logink.co/contact): Free consultation and inquiry form
- [Layanan (ID)](https://logink.co/layanan): All services overview in Indonesian
